name: Ichthus School Jakarta

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Caringin Barat No. 1, Cilandak Barat, Jakarta Selatan 12430, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Ichthus is one of the more affordable Cambridge options in Jakarta, with two campuses - South Jakarta in Kemang and another in Cibubur.
paragraphs: Parents say Ichthus is one of the more affordable Cambridge options in Jakarta, with two campuses - South Jakarta in Kemang and another in Cibubur.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.9K – US$13K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Two campuses (South and West Jakarta), Science laboratories, Computer labs, Library, Sports facilities.
